mpeg_o.mass_spectrum
====================

.. py:module:: mpeg_o.mass_spectrum

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   ``MassSpectrum`` — MS subclass with m/z + intensity channels.



Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   mpeg_o.mass_spectrum.MassSpectrum


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: MassSpectrum

   Bases: :py:obj:`mpeg_o.spectrum.Spectrum`


   A mass spectrum: m/z + intensity arrays plus MS level, polarity,
   and an optional scan window.

   :param ms_level: MS level (1, 2, 3, ...).
   :type ms_level: int, default 1
   :param polarity: Ion polarity.
   :type polarity: Polarity, default Polarity.UNKNOWN
   :param scan_window: m/z range covered by the scan. ``None`` if not reported.
   :type scan_window: ValueRange or None, default None
   :param \*plus all base :class:`Spectrum` parameters (signal_arrays:
   :param axes:
   :param :
   :param index_position:
   :param scan_time_seconds:
   :param precursor_mz:
   :param precursor_charge)*:

   .. rubric:: Notes

   API status: Stable.

   Standard channel names are ``"mz"`` and ``"intensity"``.

   Cross-language equivalents
   --------------------------
   Objective-C: ``MPGOMassSpectrum`` · Java:
   ``com.dtwthalion.mpgo.MassSpectrum``.


   .. py:attribute:: MZ
      :value: 'mz'



   .. py:attribute:: INTENSITY
      :value: 'intensity'



   .. py:attribute:: ms_level
      :type:  int
      :value: 1



   .. py:attribute:: polarity
      :type:  mpeg_o.enums.Polarity


   .. py:attribute:: scan_window
      :type:  mpeg_o.value_range.ValueRange | None
      :value: None



   .. py:property:: mz_array
      :type: mpeg_o.signal_array.SignalArray


      Return the ``"mz"`` :class:`SignalArray`. Raises if absent.


   .. py:property:: intensity_array
      :type: mpeg_o.signal_array.SignalArray


      Return the ``"intensity"`` :class:`SignalArray`.
